entities.name: WEEDS
entities.description: Unwanted plants that cause losses in crop yield and quality

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: QUALITY
entities.description: The standard of the crop produced

entities.name: MANUAL WEEDING
entities.description: The process of removing weeds by hand

entities.name: HERBICIDE
entities.description: Chemical substances used to control unwanted plants

entities.name: WEED CONTROL
entities.description: The process of managing or eliminating weeds

entities.name: NON-TARGET TOXICITIES
entities.description: Harmful effects of herbicides on organisms other than the target weeds

entities.name: HERBICIDE-RESISTANT WEEDS
entities.description: Weeds that have evolved to withstand herbicide treatment

entities.name: CROP ECOLOGIES
entities.description: The environmental conditions and interactions within crop-growing areas

entities.name: WEED CONTROL EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The effectiveness of a weed control method in reducing weed populations

entities.name: AGRO-ECOLOGIES
entities.description: The ecological environment of a farming system

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain harvested per unit area

entities.name: ARABLE CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown on land that is suitable for plowing

entities.name: ECONOMIC BENEFIT
entities.description: The financial gain resulting from a specific agricultural practice

entities.name: CHEMICAL WEED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The use of chemicals to control weed growth

entities.name: NET RETURNS
entities.description: The profit remaining after all expenses are deducted

entities.name: SOIL MICRO-ORGANISMS
entities.description: Microscopic organisms living in the soil

entities.name: RESIDUAL TOXICITY
entities.description: The remaining toxic effect of a chemical in the environment

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: The physical and chemical factors of the surrounding environment

entities.name: PESTICIDE
entities.description: Chemicals used to kill pests, including herbicides

entities.name: FRAGILE ECOSYSTEM
entities.description: An ecosystem that is easily disrupted by external pressures

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The rate of production of the cropping system

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The ability of a farming operation to generate profit

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having stable and sufficient resources for living

entities.name: INTEGRATED WEED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A holistic approach to weed control combining multiple methods

entities.name: WEED POPULATIONS
entities.description: The total number of weeds in a given area

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL FOOT-PRINT
entities.description: The impact of human activities on the environment

entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEM SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability of a cropping system to maintain productivity over time

entities.name: WEED RESISTANCE
entities.description: The inherited ability of a weed to survive herbicide application
